About Me

I'm Toka Sayed, a Junior Flutter Mobile Developer and Computer Science student at Assiut University (Mathematics Dept.)

My journey spans mobile development with Dart & Flutter, frontend web development with HTML/CSS/Bootstrap, and hands-on penetration testing and ethical hacking.

I've trained with NTI (National Telecommunication Institute), Vodafone Egypt, and Google Developer Groups — building real projects, leading teams, and earning certs along the way.

Currently exploring API integration in Flutter and sharpening my security skills through TryHackMe.
